notes.go: AOT compiled — no JIT, flat baseline expected
notes.python: CPython — no JIT, flat baseline expected
notes.csharp: Tier 1 activates within first window (~0.6s at 50 RPS), effectively instant
notes.typescript: V8 TurboFan expected around window t=90-120s
